activities.text: 🤖 Rawbot published the RAW AI site update with the new Success Team section and Mission Control CTA.
🏠 Top Imobiliária main contact flow was fixed to redirect reliably to WhatsApp with structured lead data.
📬 Rawbot cleaned André's Close inbox by moving non-André-owned tasks out of the way.
💰 Cialdini/Rawbot sent ballpark quote outreach for Geovanni Salazar and moved the follow-up task forward.
🎙️ Voice stack audit completed: ElevenLabs auth works but quota is blocked; Edge TTS installed but not yet generating audio due to endpoint/network failure.
🧠 Rawbot recovered the Comeketo quote rules and pricing structure from backup memory and calculator sources.
